name: 01-deload-due-6-weeks
description: User has completed 6 weeks (two Leader blocks) since last deload, no upcoming A-priority race, productive TSB. Expected verdict: deload-now or deload-soon — engine should not push for continued accumulation.

input.userPrompt:
## Question
Should I deload this week, push through, or change something?

## Active block context
- Current block: Leader 2 (BBB Forever variant)
- Week within block: Week 3 (final loading week before any deload)
- Weeks since last deload: 6
- Sessions completed this block: 11/12

## Load signals (computed)
- TSB: -8 (productive load range)
- ACWR: 1.15 (sweet spot)
- CTL: 78 (rising, +4 vs 4w ago)
- ATL: 86 (slight acute spike from recent run volume)

## Race calendar
- No A-priority races in next 12 weeks
- One C-priority parkrun in 4 weeks

## Training anchors
- TM%: 85%
- Goals: hypertrophy primary, marathon secondary
- Lift days: 4/week
- External cardio source: Runna (do not prescribe runs)

Provide your structured verdict per the schema.
